title: Researchers claim open-source AI-RAN milestone
description: Researchers at Northeastern University demonstrated what they claimed is the first open-source prototype of a massive MIMO AI-RAN system, bringing together hardware from AmpliTech Group, software from OpenAirInterface, and GPU acceleration from Nvidia in a single standards-compliant platform. The post Researchers claim open-source AI-RAN milestone appeared first on Mobile World Live .
